title: SnowyGUI
description: Kotlin client-side (cursed) mod adding a gui with a few quality-of-life toggleable features
body:
A mod adding a GUI with some features geared at QoL, like command macros.

It has both a fabric* and a (neo)forge version; for the fabric version, [fabric-language-kotlin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-language-kotlin) mod is required, or [kotlinforforge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) if you wish to use the forge one.

If you want to use the configuration screen, please install the cloth config mod or a mod that bundles it.
